violations.text: Sauce that was prepared on site was observed held past its seven-day date marking limit. PIC voluntarily disposed of product at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

A knife (chipped) and mixing bowl (food contact surface cracked, and loose piece held with tape) were observed in poor repair. PIC took both items out of service at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
